title: Ssssk!
content:
{{Top|ga|leg}} {{Character |type=Galactic Empire |image=[[File:Ssssk.jpg]] |name=Ssssk! |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Feline/Legends|Feline]][[Star Wars (1977) 84|''Star Wars'' (1977) 84]] |gender= |pronouns=He/him |height= |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|Brown]] |feathers= |eyes=Yellow |skin= |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Be thankful, scum… that this 'scruff-ball' limited his telepathic assault, or you would have been reduced to the very lumps of unsentient proto-plasmic slime that you resemble!|Ssssk! informs a pair of stormtroopers of the "kindness" he had shown them|}} '''Ssssk!''' was a [[Telepathy/Legends|telepathic]] member of a [[Feline/Legends|feline]] [[Species/Legends|species]] who served as an [[Adjutant/Legends|adjutant]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. In [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], Ssssk! was stationed on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Seoul 5]] under Imperial [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Drezzel]], where he telepathically monitored a pair of Imperial-funded [[Scientist/Legends|scientists]] researching there. When the scientists discovered that a type of [[Seoularian crystal|crystal]] found on the planet had once been used as a power source, Ssssk! learned of the discovery by reading their minds and reported it to his superiors. The scientists were [[Prison/Legends|imprisoned]], and the [[Crystal/Legends|crystals]] were tested for use in [[Weapon/Legends|weapons]] development. When the [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] [[Mission to Seoul 5|arrived]] on Seoul 5, Ssssk! was sent to find him, and the pair ended up facing off in a [[Crystal control room|subterranean room]]. Ssssk! attempted to telepathically assault Solo, but the smuggler used a [[key crystal]] to defeat the feline. However, Solo accidentally activated all of the crystals using the key crystal, resulting in a blinding flash that the smuggler and scientists used to escape, followed by a large explosion that destroyed the [[Seoul 5 city|city]] the crystal was located in and the Imperial forces stationed there. ==Biography== ===Telepathic tattletale=== {{Quote|Things went well until we discovered those crystals out there. According to the inscriptions on the base of the pedestal, the Seoularians used the crystals to mentally power ''every'' device on the planet. ''But'', unknown to us, Ssssk!, the captain's pet telepath, was constantly monitoring our thoughts, and reported our discovery the moment we translated it.|Fem Nu-Ar|}} [[File:SssskImperials-SW84.png|thumb|right|300px|Ssssk! used his telepathic powers in service to the Empire.]] The [[Feline/Legends|feline]] [[Telepathy/Legends|telepath]] Ssssk! lived during the [[Imperial Era/Legends|reign]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], a power he had come to serve as an [[Adjutant/Legends|adjutant]] by [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]].The events of [[Star Wars (1977) 84|''Star Wars'' (1977) 84]] take place following the events of [[Star Wars (1977) 81|''Star Wars'' (1977) 81]], which dates itself to just after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], and [[Star Wars (1977) 88|''Star Wars'' (1977) 88]] which depicts the [[Nagai–Tof War]]. The Battle of [[Endor/Legends|Endor]] and the [[Nagai/Legends|Nagai]]-[[Tof/Legends|Tof]] War are dated to [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]] by ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' and ''[[The Forgotten War: The Nagai and the Tofs]]'', respectively, meaning that the events of ''Star Wars'' (1977) 81 must also take place in this [[Standard year/Legends|year]]. He served under a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Captain/Legends|captain]] named [[Drezzel]] and accompanied him and his [[Imperial Military/Legends|Imperial troops]] to the lost [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Seoul 5]] in order to protect a pair of [[Scientist/Legends|scientists]] whom the Empire was funding to carry out research on the world. The two scientists, [[Doctor/Legends|Doctor]] [[Ualp Xathan]] and assistant, [[Fem Nu-Ar]], had provided the Empire with charts they had found showing the [[Hyperspace route/Legends|route]] to the [[Seoul system/Legends|Seoul system]] in return for funding. On the planet, they began researching an abandoned [[Seoul 5 city|city]] built there by the [[Seoularian]]s, an [[Death/Legends|extinct]] [[Homeworld/Legends|native]] [[Species/Legends|species]]. As the scientists worked, Ssssk! used his telepathic skills to keep tabs on them by reading their minds. After they translated the ancient [[Seoulian]] texts, the pair discovered that a series of [[Seoularian crystal|crystals]] had once been used to power the entire [[City/Legends|city]], which Ssssk! then reported to his superiors before the scientists could reveal it. Xathan and Nu-Ar were then [[Prisoner/Legends|confined]] and tied up and the [[Crystal/Legends|crystals]] taken for [[Weapon/Legends|weapons]] development. ===Subduing slime=== {{Quote|Yessss, Ssssk! has him now, captain! He's a slimy treasure hunting pirate, and he's hiding…hiding…behind that statue!|Ssssk! leads the other Imperials to Solo|}} [[File:SssskAttacks-SW84.png|thumb|left|300px|Sssk! was unpopular with the stormtroopers he served beside.]] In 4 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|ABY]], the [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] [[Mission to Seoul 5|landed]] on Seoul 5 after acquiring the coordinates of the planet while [[Gambling/Legends|gambling]] with an old [[Unidentified Imperial scout|Imperial scout]], who also gave him [[Key crystal|one]] of the crystals from the planet. The Imperials on the planet detected Solo's landing, and once Drezzel was informed, he ordered Ssssk! and [[Squad Three (Galactic Empire)|Squad Three]], a group of [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]], to report to him immediately. As the telepath approached the [[IF-120 landing craft]] where Drezzel was stationed, he heard a pair of stormtroopers insulting him and telepathically assaulted them, causing them enough pain to leave the pair writhing on the floor. Drezzel then ordered Ssssk! and the [[Squad/Legends|squad]] to accompany him in tracking down the unauthorized visitor, after which they made their way into the city, with Ssssk! mentally probing the area. The telepath eventually found Solo, who was hiding behind a statue of the [[Deity/Legends|deity]] [[Onrai]], and directed the troops to his location, where they started to shoot at him. The troopers' [[Blaster/Legends|blasterfire]] distracted Ssssk!; however, causing him to lose concentration and preventing him from probing Solo, allowing the smuggler to escape down a trapdoor activated using the statue. ===Brain battle=== {{Quote|Let ''Ssssk!'' handle him, captain. The slime won't escape again!|Ssssk!|}} [[File:Ssssk_beaten.jpg|thumb|right|300px|Ssssk! collapsed after attempting to attack Han Solo.]] Ssssk! and Drezzel then made their way down to the [[Crystal control room|room]] that the trapdoor led to, with Drezzel ordering the stormtroopers who had already reached Solo to stop firing, as he did not want them to damage the Seoularian crystals in the room. Instead, Ssssk! telepathically attacked Solo, who had found the imprisoned scientists in the room; however, Solo boosted his own mental powers using the crystal he had with him, which the scientists had identified as the key crystal. With his increased capability, Solo was able to defend himself from the feline's attack and caused the telepath to collapse. The smuggler was also drained by the attack and accidentally locked the key crystal into a pedestal in the chamber while stumbling to support himself. The placement of the crystal caused the other crystals to activate and the chamber to flood with light, allowing Solo and the scientists to escape to the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']], Solo's [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300 light freighter]], and flee. As they flew away, a huge explosion erupted from the crystal control room, destroying the city along with much of the surrounding area. ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|I dunno, do you think he can really read minds like they say?''"
"''I hope that the overgrown scruff-ball can't, or he might…''"
"''Yeeaaaa!''"
"''Aaarrrggg!|Two stormtroopers discuss Ssssk! before he telepathically assaults them|}} Ssssk! was a member of a feline species and possessed [[Color/Legends|brown]] [[Hair/Legends|fur]] and yellow [[Eye/Legends|eyes]]. He was unpopular with the Imperial stormtroopers with whom he served, who viewed him as Drezzel's pet and called him names based on his feline appearance. The scientists also refered to Ssssk! as Drezzel's pet and Solo considered the telepath a creep. ==Skills and abilities== {{Quote|Stop firing, you fools! I can't concentrate! He's going to…|Ssssk! is distracted by stormtroopers|}} [[File:SssskVsSolo-SW84.png|thumb|left|300px|Ssssk! attacked Solo with his telepathic powers.]] Ssssk!'s telepathic abilities allowed him to read minds and cause others to collapse while writhing in pain, which he claimed was only the result of a limited attack. However, he was unable to best Solo while the Human's mental energy was boosted by the crystal. Ssssk! also claimed to have the power to reduce Humans to non-sentience if he wished to and could mentally probe for hidden foes, although the firing of blasters around him could affect his concentration and break this effect. ==Equipment== Ssssk! wore a purple [[Robe/Legends|robe]], brown shoes, and tan [[Clothing/Legends|pants]]. ==Behind the scenes== Ssssk! appeared in the [[Star Wars (1977) 84|eighty-fourth issue]] of the [[1977]] [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] series [[Star Wars (1977)|''Star Wars'']]. The issue was written by [[Roy Richardson]], illustrated by [[David Mazzucchelli]], and published by [[Marvel Comics]] on [[June 1]], [[1984]].{{Marvel|url=comics/issue/53874/star_wars_1977_84|text=Star Wars (1977) #84}} ==Appearances== *[[Star Wars (1977) 84|''Star Wars'' (1977) 84]] {{Reprint|Star Wars (1977) 84}} {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Ssssk!}} {{Reflist}} [[Category:Imperial Army officers of the Galactic Empire]] [[Category:Individuals of unidentified species]] [[Category:Individuals of unspecified gender]] [[Category:Individuals with he/him pronouns]]
